item.title: How Saudi Cybersecurity Can Help Shape Morocco's Security Ecosystem
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)
item.description: Morocco has the talent. Saudi Arabia has the frameworks. Here’s why the corridor between them might be the smartest move nobody is making yet.

item.title: Day in the Life of an Offensive Cybersecurity Consultant
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)
item.description: Still figuring out what cybersecurity jobs look like after graduation? Pentests, bank audits, and client meetings. Here’s a day in the life of an offensive cybersecurity consultant, with Souad at Dataprotect.

item.title: My First Internship In Offensive Security, Recap
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)
item.description: I completed my first internship in offensive security, working on an Active Directory lab and project. I gracefully took my time to understand AD principles, secure them, and document the journey.

item.title: A recruiter’s advice to get you hired in cybersecurity
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)
item.description: When you start in cybersecurity, everyone talks about skills, certificates, and ticking the boxes to get hired… This conversation with an expert recruiter gives you all the answers

item.title: Harvard CS50’s Introduction to Cybersecurity Made My Classes Easy
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)
item.description: Sometimes, one online course can be all it takes to break into a field. And in my story, it was the Harvard CS50’s introduction to cybersecurity! Here is a detailed course review

item.title: Windows vs. Linux, A Simple Guide That Finally Makes Sense
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)
item.description: Confused about Windows vs Linux? This beginner-friendly guide explains key differences, use cases, and insights from a systems and network administrator.

item.title: Want to Break Into Tech? Start With a Hackathon
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)
item.description: Ever heard of hackathons but never dared to try? Same, until I wrote this. Discover how hackathons go beyond coding, helping you build skills, confidence, and a stronger tech presence.

item.title: How to Learn Programming Faster: A DevOps Engineer’s Approach
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)
item.description: Most programming learners struggle to make real progress. Let’s see how to master programming faster with practical advice from an experienced DevOps engineer.

item.title: How To break into Cybersecurity: Advice From A Learner
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)
item.description: Cybersecurity is now essential across all fields. If you’re new and unsure where to start, this piece shares a learner’s journey and advice to guide you fast.

item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)

item.title: The Expert View: Quantum Readiness Before It's Too Late
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)

item.title: What is ISO 27001 and Why It Matters
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)

item.title: Work With Me
item.author: hello@nohawrites.com (Noha Writes)
item.description:
✨Turn Complex Cybersecurity Topics Into High-Authority Content That Builds Trust and Generates Leads✨

I’m a cybersecurity engineer and B2B content consultant who knows exactly how to bridge the gap between deep technical engineering and clear corporate communication.

As a specialized B2B cybersecurity content writer, I build your industry authority, educate technical decision-makers, and accelerate your sales pipeline.

And because I actively participate in security labs and break down complex technical environments, I do not require hand-held technical onboarding. You can hand me a product brief, API documentation, or a technical concept, and I start writing immediate, fluff-free content.
